---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component, prop, or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing or awkward today?
<!-- e.g. "There's no borderless variant for X", "DataTable can't do Y" -->

## Proposed solution

Describe the component or API you'd like. If you can, sketch the props:

```tsx
<NewThing variant="soft" onChange={...} />
```

## Design fit

How does this fit Basil's design language ("v2" — flat hairline surfaces,
shadows only on overlays, borderless tinted status, light mode only)?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've tried or thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Screenshots, references to similar components in other libraries, or use cases.
